_comment: Example ONLY. Real secrets (BETA_AGENT_KEYRING/KEY_ID) are provisioned out-of-band and NEVER committed. Set these as service-scoped environment variables. NOTE (verification): a machine env var is NOT a protected secret store — restrict it to the service account and rotate the key; DPAPI/Credential Manager retrieval is a follow-up. Do not provision the keyring until the post-approval start.
